name: Later
one_liner: Later is a social revenue platform combining influencer marketing, social media management, and creator commerce tools for brands and creators.

ambiguities: Total funding of $268M is attributed to the Mavrck entity (pre-merger) per Tracxn; Later (original Latergramme entity) raised less than $2M separately before the 2022 acquisition.
Headcount estimate of ~1,000 is inferred from ZoomInfo's 1,000–5,000 range and the 300+ figure at time of 2022 merger; no precise current figure publicly confirmed.
The $250M Mavely acquisition (Jan 2025) is an outgoing M&A spend, not an incoming funding round, and is not included in total_raised_usd.
HQ is Vancouver, BC for the original Later brand; the Mavrck legacy entity was based in Boston, MA. The unified Later brand lists Vancouver as primary HQ.
Founded year of 2014 applies to both the original Later (Latergramme) and Mavrck, which both originated that year.
